title: SensorReading
description: A single raw sensor reading ingested from a ThingSpeak channel and written to S3. Each record represents one ThingSpeak feed entry after field mapping and normalization.

device_id.description: Logical device identifier assigned in config (e.g. 'device-001'). Used as the primary partition key in the Delta table and dedup merge key.

entry_id.description: ThingSpeak entry_id for this feed record. Monotonically increasing per channel; used as the natural deduplication key when upserting into Delta Lake (MERGE on device_id + entry_id).

recorded_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the sensor recorded the reading. Mapped from ThingSpeak 'created_at'. Stored in UTC throughout the pipeline.

vibration_rms.description: Root-mean-square vibration amplitude in millimetres per second (mm/s). Mapped from ThingSpeak field1. Null when the sensor did not report a value. Silver layer fills null with -1.0 sentinel.

temperature_celsius.description: Ambient or component temperature in degrees Celsius (°C). Mapped from ThingSpeak field2. Null when the sensor did not report a value. Silver layer fills null with -1.0 sentinel.

pressure_bar.description: Fluid or gas pressure in bar (bar). Mapped from ThingSpeak field3. Null when the sensor did not report a value. Silver layer fills null with -1.0 sentinel.

source_channel.description: The numeric ThingSpeak channel ID this reading was fetched from. Preserved for lineage and re-ingestion purposes.

ingested_at.description: ISO-8601 UTC timestamp of when the ingestion process wrote this record to S3. Used for pipeline latency monitoring and late-arrival detection in CloudWatch.
